title: manilkara longistyla
intro: Manilkara longistyla, also known as the African sterculia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its distinctive, long-stemmed flowers. Traditionally, the plant's roots and bark have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Manilkara longistyla include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and swelling, and exhibit antimalarial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bark are typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
